markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Reconcile December cloud costs to finalize year-end financials.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**December Anthropic cost discrepancy:** A \~$4.5k gap exists between the $64.5k Ramp charge and the \~$60k reported by the cost tracker.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Root cause:** The gap is likely due to multiple cardholders (Yusuf, Daniel, Jason, Marcel) using separate accounts, which obscures the total usage cost.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Ericksson received billing access to Anthropic and OpenAI to pull invoices directly, enabling a full reconciliation.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [**Cost allocation strategy:** All CheckDat-related spend will be booked as R\&D; Leonardo will define the specific tools that fall into this category.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Topics

### Problem: December Cost Discrepancy

  - [Ericksson needs accurate December cloud costs to finalize year-end financials, as these figures directly impact gross margin calculations.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [A \~$4.5k discrepancy was found for Anthropic:](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Ramp Charge:** $64.5k](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Cost Tracker Report:** \~$60k](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** The gap stems from multiple cardholders using separate accounts, making it impossible to match the single Ramp charge to a single usage report.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Solution: Direct Billing Access

  - [To resolve the discrepancy, Leonardo granted Ericksson direct billing access to the top two spend vendors.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [**Anthropic:** Granted "Owner" access to the main account.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This profile provides full visibility into invoices and usage history.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [**OpenAI:** Granted "Standard API" access.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This profile allows viewing billing info without modifying API keys, preventing service disruptions.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [**Gina AI:** Ericksson will use the shared "tools" credential.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is considered low-risk for account blocks.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)

### Context: Cost Allocation Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Allocate costs to the correct buckets (e.g., prod vs. dev, specific product lines) for accurate financial reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Decision:** All costs associated with the CheckDat project will be booked as R\&D.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Leonardo will identify the specific tools used for CheckDat to enable this allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [**Vendor List:** The full list of vendors needing allocation is:](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [Anthropic, OpenAI, Gina AI, SEMrush, Exa, Render, Perplexity, Temporal, World Technologies, AWS, Datadog, Snowflake, Google Cloud, Cursor, Clerc.dev.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ericksson:**](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [Use new billing access to pull December invoices from Anthropic and OpenAI.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [Reconcile vendor invoices against Ramp charges to resolve the \~$4.5k discrepancy.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Leonardo:**](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [Identify which tools from the vendor list are used for the CheckDat project.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [Communicate the CheckDat tool list to Ericksson to enable R\&D cost allocation.](https://fathom.video/share/Vit8rWamiMg5P3g_QzUUHVCvJ-Es1kks?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
